treatment_information.treatment_response: Symptoms improved slightly to the point where the patient could start to tolerate liquids.

treatment_timeline.event: Patient admitted for IV treatment and PICC line due to progressive candidiasis.

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Infusions set up for follow up, will continue to follow closely with outpatient team.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Recommended initiation of AIDS therapy for long-term management of esophagitis.
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient is knowledgeable about options and future plans.
